name: Patrol + Chase Enemy
description: An AI enemy that patrols between two points and chases the player when within detection range. Uses Pawn + FloatingPawnMovement + AIController with timer-based distance checks. Proven working without NavMesh (bUsePathfinding=false).
requires: NavMeshBoundsVolume in level (optional — works without via bUsePathfinding=false)
known_constraints: Uses MoveToLocation with bUsePathfinding=false — enemy moves in straight lines, no obstacle avoidance
Character class causes SCS component issues — use Pawn with FloatingPawnMovement instead
BT MoveTo requires NavMesh which may not build in World Partition — direct movement used as fallback
set_class_defaults must use full /Game/ path for Blueprint classes
Spawning must use full /Game/ path for the class parameter

enemy_pawn.blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{pawn_name|BP_SimpleEnemy}}
PARENT: Pawn

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="Enemy Spawned"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
additional_setup: Add FloatingPawnMovement component (may need manual add or via add_component if supported)

ai_controller.blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{controller_name|BP_EnemyAIController}}
PARENT: AIController

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="Enemy AI Active"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute

node_editing_required.description: The patrol + chase logic is too complex for DSL alone. After creating the base Blueprint, use node editing commands to build the Tick/Timer logic.
patrol_logic: CustomEvent DoPatrol: alternate MoveToLocation between PatrolPointA and PatrolPointB
chase_logic: CustomEvent CheckDistance: GetPlayerPawn → GetDistanceTo → if < chase_range, MoveToLocation toward player
When chasing, pause patrol timer. When player leaves range, resume patrol.

behavior_tree.description: Optional — BT asset for future use when NavMesh is available
behavior_tree.bt_dsl:
BEHAVIORTREE: {{bt_name|BT_EnemyPatrol}}
BLACKBOARD: {{bb_name|BB_EnemyPatrol}}

KEY PatrolPointA: Vector
KEY PatrolPointB: Vector
KEY GoingToB: Bool = true
KEY TargetActor: Object

TREE:

SELECTOR: Root
  SEQUENCE: Chase
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=TargetActor, Condition=IsSet, AbortMode=LowerPriority]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=TargetActor, AcceptableRadius=150]
    TASK: PrintString [Message="Caught you!"]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]
  SEQUENCE: PatrolToB
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=GoingToB, Condition=Equals, Value=true]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolPointB, AcceptableRadius=100]
    TASK: SetBlackboardValue [Key=GoingToB, Value=false]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]
  SEQUENCE: PatrolToA
    DECORATOR: BlackboardBased [Key=GoingToB, Condition=Equals, Value=false]
    TASK: MoveTo [Key=PatrolPointA, AcceptableRadius=100]
    TASK: SetBlackboardValue [Key=GoingToB, Value=true]
    TASK: Wait [Duration=1.0]

customizable.chase_range: Distance at which enemy starts chasing (default: 800)
